title: 200g Freeze Dried Chicken Cat Treats 100% Natural Chicken Breast Nibbles Allergen-Free & Hypoallergenic Cat Treat for Indoor & Outdoor Nutritious Treats Grain Free for Cats
features: Protein-Rich and Peak Vitality: Freeze-Dried Cat Treats are packed with more protein per bite than industry standards, ensuring your cat receives the peak vitality it deserves. Made from premium butcher cut chicken breast, these treats are a powerhouse of nutrition.

Unlocking Natural Benefits: Our freeze-dried raw cat treats are crafted from the finest butcher cut raw protein, harnessing the naturally occurring vitamins and minerals found in chicken breast. This high-protein diet supports energetic playtimes, healthy skin, shiny coats, strong teeth, and essential gut health for your feline friend.

Free from Unwanted Additives: 100% chicken breast cat treats are free from any additives, fillers, dyes, flavorings, artificial preservatives, grains, or rendered by-products. Our commitment to purity offers a wide variety of single-protein options, catering to the needs of picky eaters and cats with allergies.

Freeze-Dried for Ultimate Freshness: Our proteins are frozen within 45 minutes of harvesting to lock in peak nutrients, flavor, and freshness. The slow-freeze-drying process ensures minimal processing, preserving the vital nutrients in a way that mirrors nature's intent, providing your cat with the most natural and nutritious treat possible.

Complementary for Adult Cats: Designed as a complementary treat for cats, these all-natural snacks can be enjoyed as often as desired. However, it's important to monitor your cat's total food intake to prevent overfeeding. Please note, these treats are not suitable for kittens under 3 months of age.
